assertions.name: NightwatchAssertError
assertions.message:
Failed [equal]: (Device setup failed — device may not be connected: WebDriverError: An unknown server-side error occurred while processing the command. Original error: Device 192.168.0.140:5555 was not in the list of connected devices when running "http://localhost:4723/session" with method "POST") - expected "null" but got: "Error: WebDriverError: An unknown server-side error occurred while processing the command. Original error: Device 192.168.0.140:5555 was not in the list of connected devices when running "http://localhost:4723/session" with method "POST"

    at process.processTicksAndRejections (node:internal/process/task_queues:95:5)
    at async _WebDriver.newSession (file:///C:/Users/shibi/OneDrive%20-%20SIRA.Gov.AE/keyless-appium/node_modules/webdriver/build/node.js:1753:41)
    at async remote (file:///C:/Users/shibi/OneDrive%20-%20SIRA.Gov.AE/keyless-appium/node_modules/webdriverio/build/node.js:9979:20)
    at async configAppiumTest (C:\Users\shibi\OneDrive - SIRA.Gov.AE\keyless-appium\config\config.js:29:18)

assertions.failure: Expected "null" but got: "Error: WebDriverError: An unknown server-side error occurred while processing the command. Original error: Device 192.168.0.140:5555 was not in the list of connected devices when running "http://localhost:4723/session" with method "POST""

Should launch the Keyless app in POCO.failure: Expected "null" but got: "Error: WebDriverError: An unknown server-side error occurred while processing the command. Original error: Device 192.168.0.140:5555 was not in the list of connected devices when running "http://localhost:4723/session" with method "POST""
